title: Svendborg、Southern Denmark — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Svendborg、Southern Denmarkの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

SvendborgはSouthern Denmarkにある人口27,000の都市です。A charming port town on the island of Funen, known for its maritime heritage, cobbled streets, and nearby archipelago.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
